case_title: JOEL H SIEGAL VS. STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SIEGAL, JOEL H AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY AGENT SOP - D SILVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAN WEINGARTEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY KENNY MOY--CLAIMS REP.NO COSTS, AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAN WEINGARTEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIEGAL, JOEL H IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY AGENT SOP - D SILVER DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. THE INSURANCE POLICY UAMBIGUOUSLY EXCLUDES LOSSES FROM DRY OR WET ROT, WEAR, TEAR, DETORIATION, LATENT DEFECT REGARDLESS OF CAUSE. SEE SECTION 1. PARAGRAPH 2. OF THE POLICY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAN WEINGARTEN. FILED BY SIEGAL, JOEL H STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY AGENT SOP - D SILVER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY AGENT SOP - D SILVER
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $70.00 - SERVED JUL-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY AGENT SOP - D SILVER
